sources.name: GitHub Security Advisories
sources.focus: New vulnerabilities in Node.js, Python, JavaScript ecosystems relevant to our stack

sources.name: Node.js Security RSS
sources.focus: Node.js vulnerabilities that affect our Vercel deployment and API layer

sources.name: OWASP News
sources.focus: Web application security testing patterns applicable to our API endpoints

sources.name: Snyk Vulnerability DB
sources.focus: npm package vulnerabilities — check against our package.json dependencies

sources.name: NIST NVD Recent
sources.focus: Recent CVEs — filter for web application, JavaScript, API security issues

sources.name: The Hacker News
sources.focus: Emerging security threats, breach patterns, defense strategies for small platforms

sources.name: Reddit netsec
sources.focus: Network security community — vulnerability disclosures, pentesting tools, defense patterns

sources.name: Reddit cybersecurity
sources.focus: Cybersecurity practitioner discussions — incident response, threat detection, tooling

github.use_for: Search GitHub Security Advisories, CVE repos, dependency vulnerability databases, security tool repos

youtube.use_for: Security conference talks (DEF CON, Black Hat), vulnerability demos, tool tutorials
